author: Patrick Zeitz
description: Backup connector for orchestrator (read-only REST API).
name: Agent Backup - by Jung und Wild design

sections.changelog: Current release: 0.3.4. See the linked public repository for the packaged ZIP and update metadata.
sections.description: Backup connector for orchestrator (read-only REST API).
sections.installation: Install the ZIP via Plugins > Add New > Upload Plugin, then activate it. The plugin uses this public metadata file for WordPress-native updates by default.
